curation_notes: Patch adds libxml_disable_entity_loader(true) to REST_Controller::__construct(), which globally disables XML external entity loading before any request parsing occurs. Primary location is the constructor where the fix was applied. Format::_from_xml() is a sibling location in the same directory that performs the actual XML parsing via simplexml_load_string() without XXE protection. Pre-assigned class xxe confirmed: CWE-611 maps directly to XXE, the advisory explicitly states 'allows XXE attacks', and the patch disables external entity loading.
